author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Music – Announcement Trailer
Nintendo Music is available now, exclusively to active Nintendo Switch Online members. Learn more: https://www.nintendo.com/us/online/nintendo-switch-online/nintendo-music/

Enjoy Nintendo game music—now on your phone, computer, tablet, or even in the car with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto! Nintendo Music features a variety of tracks from Nintendo franchises, plus curated playlists based on characters, in-game moments, and moods. From recent releases to nostalgic classics, even more music will be added in the future.

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required. Not available in all countries. Internet and compatible smart device required to use app. Data charges may apply. Terms apply. nintendo.com/switch-online

#NintendoMusic

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://www.nintendo.com/us/

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Star Fox — Overview Trailer — Nintendo Switch 2
Star Fox launches exclusively on the Nintendo Switch 2 system June 25, 2026. Pre-orders are available now on Nintendo eShop: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/star-fox-switch-2/

Step into the boots of Fox McCloud and blast off for adventure to save the Lylat System from the evil scientist, Andross. Take to the skies in the Arwing, protect the ground in the Landmaster, and plumb the depths in the Blue-Marine. Learn more about this cinematic take on the Star Fox 64 story, reborn exclusively on Nintendo Switch 2!

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Music – New Updates Trailer
Listen to Nintendo Music today on your phone, computer, tablet, or even in the car: https://music.nintendo.com/?utm_source=Service&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=A1005-01&utm_id=A1005-01 

Enjoy your favorite songs from Nintendo games, anytime, anywhere!  
- Listen in the car with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto 
- Create and share playlists 
- “My Mix” generates a playlist via play history 
- Peek at the library, even without Nintendo Switch Online (web only) 

Nintendo Music features a variety of tracks from Nintendo franchises, plus curated playlists based on characters, in-game moments, and moods. From recent releases to nostalgic classics, even more music will be added in the future. 

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required. Not available in all countries. Internet and compatible smart device required to use app. Data charges may apply. Terms apply. nintendo.com/switch-online 

#NintendoMusic 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
